description: A component ambient-reading an engine cell (§15.13.4 + §15.13.5). The Phase engine's auto-derived @phase cell (§51.0.C) is read directly inside the StatePill component body (enclosing-scope @var). A click on #go advances the engine .Idle -> .Active; the component re-renders to show Active. §15.13.5: a component MAY read an engine's variant value (value-passing), the engine singleton lives outside the component.
rationale: §15.13.4 a component establishes a subscriber on every enclosing-scope @var it references; @phase is the engine's auto-derived cell, so when the engine transitions the StatePill re-renders. §15.13.5 keeps the engine a singleton outside the (multi-instance) component while the component reads its variant value.
